description: [free] - Display amount of free and used memory in the system. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Show memory stats in human-readable format
commands.explanation: Executes the free routine logically to process: show memory stats in human-readable format

commands.description: Show memory stats specifically in Megabytes
commands.explanation: Executes the free routine logically to process: show memory stats specifically in megabytes

commands.description: Continuously display memory stats updating every 5 seconds
commands.explanation: Executes the free routine logically to process: continuously display memory stats updating every 5 seconds
